headlines.title: Track U.S., state and county gas prices
headlines.description: Are gas prices declining? NBC News is tracking national, state and county prices at the pump.

headlines.title: Budget Saving Tricks: 50/30/20 Ratio, Envelope Method, More
headlines.description: NBC’s Christine Romans joins TODAY to share best strategies to divvy up your dollars for both spending and saving. Tips include the 50/30/20 structure, the envelope method and more.

headlines.title: How to Keep Cool Without Burning Through Your Summer Budget
headlines.description: As temperatures rise, so do summer electricity bills so NBC’s Vicky Nguyen joins TODAY to share ways to keep cool without burning through your budget. Tips include leaving your thermostat set to 78 degrees when you’re not home, weather sealing your windows to keep out hot air and more.

headlines.title: Walmart digital price tags collide with shopper anxiety over 'surveillance pricing'
headlines.description: As digital price tags roll out at Walmart, there's growing concern over so-called "surveillance pricing." Walmart denies it's changing prices as shoppers stroll the aisles, but some states are starting to pass laws banning personalized pricing. NBC News' Brian Cheung reports.

headlines.title: Walmart Announces Sweeping Price Cuts on Thousands of Items
headlines.description: Despite rising inflation, Walmart announced sweeping price cuts on thousands of everyday essentials. The retail giant said you’ll see savings in groceries, including backyard cook-out items like ground beef, corn, ice cream and soda. It’s also lowering prices for household essentials, outdoor living items, toys and apparel.

headlines.title: How grocery prices have changed since Trump took office
headlines.description: Learn where grocery prices stand during the Trump administration. See how inflation is affecting the cost of eggs, bread, chicken, ground beef and more.

headlines.title: Levi’s CEO Michelle Gass hopes to ring up more sales to women
headlines.description: Levi’s has a potential source of untapped growth: sales to women, who barely make up 40% of company receipts, CEO Michelle Gass said.

headlines.title: Oil prices surge, stocks slide after Trump says Iran ceasefire is ‘over’
headlines.description: The reversal in oil markets could mean gas prices will rise again after weeks of declines.

headlines.title: Katie Couric diagnosed with temporary amnesia syndrome
headlines.description: The veteran journalist was diagnosed with transient global amnesia, which can cause sudden memory loss that can be rectified within hours.

headlines.title: AI is coming ... for the job listings
headlines.description: New data from job board Indeed finds the number of jobs that have listings with “AI” in the title have tripled from 2022 to 2026, from less than 3% to more than 8%.

headlines.title: Gas cost calculator: How much have higher gas prices cost you?
headlines.description: Americans have spent an estimated $33 billion more in gas since the Iran war started. According to an NBC News analysis, drivers who fill up twice a month paid anywhere from $20 to $300 more for gas.

headlines.title: New York City-bound flight from Kenya diverted over malfunctioning flight controls
headlines.description: The Kenya Airways flight turned back to its departure airport, Jomo Kenyatta International in the capital city, Nairobi, with no other issues reported.
